## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] docs
- [ ] chore

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are scoped and related to the PR goal
- [ ] Docs updated when behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets added
